title: 刘小枫甘阳的“博雅实验”：一场持续十七年的“小规模学术长征” | 原文
content: In 2009, Sun Yat-sen University’s Zhuhai campus launched a small liberal arts program called “Open College,” enrolling 35 students without fixed majors. Over 17 years, participants studied Latin, Greek, classical Chinese texts, and philology, guided by scholar Gan Yang. The program’s manifesto proclaimed that students should model their lives on intellectual giants rather than millionaires, a stance that sparked controversy and persists to this day.

title: 长期使用 Claude Code，大家都是怎么搭运行环境的？
content:
最近看到不少大佬在折腾用美国 VPS 跑 Claude / Claude Code 。 我自己也观察了一段时间，发现长期用下来，真正麻烦的往往不是“有没有美国出口”。

更容易踩坑的是这些：

浏览器状态不连续
登录状态容易断
本地开发工作流来回切换
自动化脚本、CLI 、IDE…

content: The article argues that the upcoming summit between President Trump and President Xi Jinping is expected to have significant real-world consequences, contrasting with past meetings that had limited impact. It highlights how the leaders’ discussions could shape policy, trade, and global stability, suggesting that this encounter will move beyond rhetoric and influence substantive international relations.

title: 妈妈们的心理负担如何演变为数字负担
content: Recent analysis shows that for many mothers the traditional mental load of managing a household has shifted into a digital one. Constantly monitoring online shopping, social‑media schedules, and information streams creates a new kind of overwhelm. The endless need to be connected and organized online adds to emotional fatigue, blurring boundaries between work, family, and personal time. This transformation highlights how digital tools, while convenient, have become additional sources of stress for modern moms.

The school noted that a former student, Yǔ, was involved in creating the controversial copy and urged him to accept criticism and assume social responsibility. The university explicitly disapproved of the campaign’s tone and message, calling for a corrective approach aligned with its educational principles.

title: LLMorphism: When humans come to see themselves as language models
content: The article examines the growing trend of people comparing themselves to large language models. It discusses how this mindset influences self‑perception, communication habits, and expectations of adaptability. The author reflects on the symbolic appeal of AI metaphor, critiquing its limits while noting how it can inspire learning and empathy. Overall, it encourages thoughtful use of the LLM analogy without overextending it as a literal identity.

title: AI算力四驾马车
content: AI computing power relies on four pillars—compute, storage, transmission, and electricity—each driven by leading firms. Key players include Cambricon (compute), Lantern (storage, global DDR5/PCIe leader), NXK (high‑speed optical modules), Dongshang (Indium phosphide chips), Shenghong (AI PCBs), CATL (battery leader), Hewang (power electronics), Weichai (engine‑to‑datacenter backup power), and Jerui (gas turbine data center power). These companies form a comprehensive, closed‑loop infrastructure for AI infrastructure.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 闷得而蜜

title: 我的远程工作这两年
content: After completing military service in September 2023, the author cycled across China, then stayed home working on open‑source and coding projects. He earned modest income through freelance scripting on Xianyu until July 2024, when he secured a remote web‑dev job paying 6,000 CNY/month. In mid‑2025 his mother fell ill with interstitial lung disease, requiring costly treatments (~10,000 CNY/month). Despite financial strain, the same employer supported remote work. The author now works for a new AI‑focused company with a higher salary, hoping to sustain employment amid AI competition.

title: DeepSeek塞进苹果本儿，分币不花实现“龙虾自由”
content: An Italian developer released ds4, a lightweight inference engine that lets DeepSeek V4 Flash run locally on a 128‑GB Apple laptop. By applying asymmetric 2‑bit MoE quantization, moving the KV cache to SSD, and using Metal GPU code, ds4 reduces memory use to enable ultra‑long 1‑million‑token context on an Apple device. The project offers free, on‑premise usage for developers, raising DeepSeek’s visibility but also diverting token‑based revenue to a local “material” model.

title: 继上次分享 claude code 经验后，过了半年我的一些新的体验带来的一篇指南分享给大家
content: The article explains building an “AI Efficiency Harness” for developers using tools like Codex, Claude, and various skills. It outlines components—model selection, reusable skill workflows, clear project rules, tool allocation, and testing procedures. The author recommends starting with minimal global and project‐specific AGENTS.md files, curating essential skills, specifying tasks with prompts that include constraints, and iteratively reviewing successes and failures. This structure transforms AI from a chat assistant into a stable part of the development workflow.

title: 拍短剧的都跑去干旅拍了
content: Former short‑form drama crews are moving into travel photography, wedding studios, and child portrait work as AI cuts production costs and speeds projects. Short‑drama budgets of ¥300,000–¥800,000 are now replaced by AI‑generated scripts and scenes costing ¥80,000–¥200,000, allowing 3–5 AI dramas per human‑produced one. This shift has left behind many specialised roles—costume, lighting, set design—whose skills no longer translate to the new, low‑margin travel‑photo market, where AI apps now compete directly with hired photographers.

title: 豆包推出收费：纯免费的大模型越来越少了
content: ByteDance’s AI app Doubao announced tiered paid subscriptions on the Apple App Store—68 ¥/month, 200 ¥/month, and 500 ¥/month—marking a shift from the past two years of free offerings. With 350 million monthly users, the move signals a broader industry trend toward monetization to offset high compute costs. Despite free core features remaining, paywalls target complex use cases like PPT creation, data analysis, and media production. The decision reflects rising infrastructure expenses and a growing emphasis on value‑based, rather than traffic‑based, revenue models.

title: Chrome 插件开发
content: vibe coding 久了发现，开发 Chrome 插件蛮上头的。 插件功能做完了，但在真正提交到 Chrome Web Store 前，还需要准备图标、截图、宣传图、商店介绍、权限说明、隐私说明和发布检查清单。 我想知道，大家会不会觉得很麻烦，都是手动处理…

title: 阻碍家族企业发展的“姓氏天花板”
content: The article discusses how a “surname ceiling” limits the growth of family-owned businesses. It explains that reliance on a family name can create rigid structures, resistance to change, and external skepticism, all of which hamper expansion. The piece calls for modernizing governance, adopting merit‑based practices, and leveraging external expertise to break these constraints and allow family firms to thrive beyond the boundaries of their legacy.

title: 如何评价浙大教授郑强称「大学生就业难这个概念我不承认，能不能少点抱怨少点索取，是享受的工作真的难找」？
content: Zhejiang University Professor Zheng Qiang argues that the claim “Chinese university graduates face employment difficulties” is misleading. He believes jobs exist but truly enjoyable positions are hard to find; early‑career roles are often temporary stepping stones. He advises students to reduce complaints, stay practical, and accept less‑ideal work as part of career development. Zheng stresses universities should teach fundamentals rather than only market demand, and that willingness to endure tougher work can lead to better long‑term outcomes.

content: A newly registered Russian‑flagged LNG tanker appears to be loading natural gas that is subject to U.S. sanctions, according to a Bloomberg report released at 09:46. The article suggests the vessel may be transporting gas from producers or exporters that are restricted under American sanctions, raising concerns about compliance with international trade restrictions.

title: DeepSeek上桌费才500亿
content: DeepSeek seeks RMB 50 billion ($7.35 billion) for a round that could value it at $51.5 billion, nearly three times China’s largest previous single‑round raise. Its advanced V4 model and 270‑person team have earned global developer support, but its revenue comes only from low‑priced API calls. The open‑source policy and minimal product suite squeeze margins, raising doubts that the valuation is backed by current earnings. The capital would fund a push toward higher‑margin products and larger scale.

title: 一年来的微博 | 原文
content: The article reflects on a year of Twitter use, criticizing excessive complaining about academic subjects. It recounts the author's teenage obsession with writing, suicidal thoughts, and how the hobby saved them. They recall feeling unelegant in college writing, choosing a new topic, and fearing early online criticism. The piece concludes with a self-aware admission of lacking academic ability and a bleak outlook toward the future.

title: 不靠利差不烧钱，Revolut 凭什么成为欧洲最赚钱的新银行？ | 原文
content: Revolut has become Europe’s most profitable new bank by avoiding reliance on traditional interest‑margin income. Its 2025 annual report, dissected by a16z, shows the firm achieved a 76 % compound annual growth rate in a mature financial market. The key to this success is a business model focused on generating revenue through non‑interest services, while maintaining higher return on equity than conventional banks, enabling rapid, cost‑efficient expansion without heavy capital burn.

title: 登录 codex 需要手机验证到成功登录的经历
content: I downloaded Codex yesterday and tried to log in with two accounts: one created in 2022 with a phone number (using an online number service) and another registered a few months ago via Google. Using the new account prompted a phone verification; switching to the old account still required verification before the username was entered. Switching proxies (CF and Google Cloud) didn’t help, and even after restarting Codex the phone check persisted. After configuring two‑factor authentication on both accounts, the old account finally logged in without a phone check. I’m looking for reliable, low‑cost overseas SMS services.

title: 谷歌AI数学家诞生：Gemini驱动，破解了48%的FrontierMath数学题 | 原文
content: Google’s DeepMind has introduced an AI "co‑mathematician" powered by Gemini that solved 48% of problems from the FrontierMath dataset. Unlike previous AI tools that merely generate proofs, this system is designed as a collaborative partner for mathematicians, reflecting William Thurston’s view that mathematics is a social endeavour. The article outlines why earlier AI approaches fell short and discusses the architecture and capabilities of the new Gemini‑based system.

title: 梁文锋率领小龙过千亿
content: In May, China’s AI landmarks DeepSeek, Moon Shadow, and Step Starin secured new $20–$40 B funding rounds, pushing valuations past $100–$200 B. DeepSeek’s $30–40 B raise—led by the State Fund and Tencent—highlights its pivot to the new V4 model and Huawei Ascend chips, aligning base models with domestic compute. The surge reshapes the market’s pricing benchmark, setting a threshold for large‑scale Chinese foundation‑model firms.

title: The first microcomputer: The transfluxor-powered Arma Micro Computer from 1962
content: The 1962 “Arma Micro Computer” was the first microcomputer, powered by a device called a transfluxor. It represented an early step toward compact, programmable computers.

title: Surfel-based global illumination on the web
content: “Surfel-based global illumination on the web” discusses a rendering technique that uses surfels—surface elements—to simulate light propagation and reflection in real‑time web graphics. The article explains how surfels approximate complex geometry and light transport with manageable performance, enabling realistic illumination effects in browser environments using WebGL or similar APIs. It highlights the approach’s balance between visual quality, computational efficiency, and practical implementation on the web.

It focuses on analyzing geopolitical tensions and their potential impact on markets, emphasizing market monitoring, risk assessment, and timely decision‑making to protect investments.

title: 9倍狂飙！SK海力士“封神”背后，藏着多少腥风血雨？
content: SK Hynix has surged to become the world’s second‑largest memory chip maker, achieving record profits in 2025–26 and a 9‑fold market‑cap rise. It survived the 1997 crisis by merging with Daewoo and LG’s storage units, then relied on low‑cost, high‑volume production during downturns to outlast rivals. The AI‑driven demand for HBM has given it pricing power, but it remains highly dependent on a single customer (NVIDIA) and faces aggressive competition from Samsung, Micron and emerging domestic players.

title: 首超龙虾，「爱马仕」Agent全球调用第一，小米MiMo是第一贡献模型
content: Hermes Agent ("爱马仕") topped OpenRouter’s global application token‑usage list on May 9, surpassing OpenClaw with 271 billion tokens consumed that day. Total token usage now exceeds 6.37 trillion. Hermes, launched in 2026 by Nous Research, features persistent memory, self‑learning, and skill refinement, earning high‑frequency, complex‑task usage. Its top five models include MiMo‑V2‑Pro (Xiaomi) and others. The surge highlights a shift toward real‑world usage metrics for AI agents, challenging AI code assistants and closed‑source agents.

title: 世界杯中国转播费从3亿美元腰斩到1.5亿，这个报价怎么样？未来还会降价吗？
content: FIFA originally offered China between 250 million and 300 million USD for 2026 World Cup broadcast rights, roughly 18–21 billion yuan. Facing resistant Chinese buyers and a market demanding realistic pricing, FIFA made a significant concession, reducing the offer to 120–150 million USD (about 8.6–10.7 billion yuan). The deal reflects China’s strong negotiating position and an overall downward trend in broadcast fees.

title: 人到中年坚持读书真的有用吗？
content: Middle-aged adults often face heavy routines and anxiety, leaving little time for study. The question is whether reading at this stage can truly improve self‑development and ease inner tension. The essay explores whether continued learning offers benefits for personal growth and mental calm in midlife, despite time constraints and stress.

title: 告别盲目锻炼 这份周练计划直接照做
content: This article offers a structured weekly workout plan for beginners, intermediate, and advanced fitness levels, covering cardio, strength, flexibility, and active recovery. It explains how to personalize frequency, intensity, and exercise selection based on age, goals, and physical limitations. Sample schedules illustrate balanced progression: beginners train 2–3 cardio days and 2 strength sessions per week; intermediates add interval training and can merge cardio and strength; advanced plans focus on high‑intensity split workouts. The guide stresses rest, gradual overload, and flexibility to prevent injury.

content: Apple has entered into an agreement with Intel to have the company manufacture chips for Apple devices.

title: 微信电脑端更新：可滚动截长图、支持发语音
content: WeChat for desktop released version 4.1.9, adding scrollable long‑screenshot, voice message sending (via mic icon or Alt key), customizable hotkeys in Settings, and a shortcut to copy emojis by selecting them then pressing “→”.

title: 消息称小米注册多枚「寻天」商标替代 YU9
content: Xiaomi has registered several “Xuntian” (SKYNOMAD) trademarks to launch an independent automotive sub‑brand, replacing the previously rumored YU9 name. The first extended‑range SUV, internally dubbed “Kunlun N3,” is slated for a late‑2024 launch without the main Xiaomi logo. This marks a key expansion into diverse, differentiated mobility offerings. Xiaomi’s internal team classifies branding details as confidential.

title: 字节跳动据悉计划将 AI 基础设施支出增加 25%
content: ByteDance plans to raise its AI infrastructure spending by 25 % this year, increasing the budget to 200 billion yuan. The move is intended to offset rising memory‑chip costs and accelerate the company’s AI development.

title: Anthropic 与 Akamai 达成价值 18 亿美元的计算协议
content: Anthropic and Akamai have entered into an $1.8 billion computing agreement.

title: OpenAI 推出 Codex Chrome 扩展，深度集成浏览器工作流
content: OpenAI has released the Codex for Chrome extension, compatible with Mac and Windows. It lets Codex access the user's browser, reading across tabs and providing context that standard APIs can’t cover. The extension addresses complex task workflows and brings AI capabilities directly into everyday office and development environments. With more than 4 million weekly active users—an eight‑fold jump from earlier this year—Codex users can install the extension via the Plugins menu in the Codex app.

title: 苹果 CarPlay 宣布接入马斯克的 Grok，车载 AI 助手竞争加剧
content: Apple has added xAI’s Grok voice assistant to CarPlay, letting iPhone users converse with Grok hands‑free while driving. The feature expands Grok’s reach but cannot take over vehicle controls; users must open the app first. With Apple opening CarPlay to third‑party assistants, competition among in‑car AI assistants intensifies, and Grok’s launch underscores automotive infotainment systems as key portals for AI applications.

content: Hacker News highlights Google’s new reCAPTCHA tying Android verification to Play Services, blocking de‑googled phones; ChatGPT 5.5 Pro quickly solves a number theory problem, raising questions about AI research barriers; the Internet Archive opens a Swiss branch for AI‑generated archives; AI shortens patch‑disclosure windows, altering vulnerability cultures; HTML is promoted over Markdown for rich docs; the EU targets VPNs for age‑verification loopholes; Meta drops Instagram DMs’ end‑to‑end encryption, sparking privacy debates. title: Making your own programming language is easier than you think (but also harder)
content: Creating a new programming language is surprisingly straightforward, yet still challenging. The process involves design choices like syntax, semantics, and tooling, which can be simplified with modern language frameworks and libraries. However, implementing a robust compiler, debugging system, and ecosystem takes significant effort and expertise. The discussion highlights that while building a language is accessible, achieving maturity and practical utility remains a hard, time‑consuming task.

title: 恒大原总裁夏海钧豪宅被拍卖 年薪 2 亿被誉「打工皇帝」
content: Former Evergrande chairman Xia Haijun’s 428‑square‑meter duplex on Qingfeng South Street, Guangzhou, is being auctioned by the Tianhe District court. The starting bid is about 49.4 million yuan, with an appraised value of 70.6 million yuan. The property is unoccupied, features basic furniture, and will be open for viewing on 19 May. Xia, who joined Evergrande in 2007 and left in 2022, has faced asset‑shifting allegations and regulatory penalties.

title: 万科将对高管调薪：薪酬与业绩联动，新增止付与追索机制
content: Vanke has approved a new executive pay plan that ties compensation closely to company performance. Salaries will consist of basic pay, performance bonuses, and long‑term incentives, with performance pay constituting at least 50% of total remuneration. If the company moves from profit to loss, executive performance pay will be reduced. The plan introduces a pay‑halt and recoup mechanism for financial restatements or executive misconduct, requiring reassessment and recovery of excess payments. The board has approved the scheme, pending shareholder approval for the 2026 term.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面

title: 哈啰回应「员工聚会把青桔和美团单车踩在脚下」：已展开内部调查，始终尊重行业伙伴
content: An image of a Haolun employee gathering went viral, showing several people reportedly stepping on Qiancare and Meituan bicycles. Haolun said the photos do not represent the company’s values or its staff’s conduct. It has launched an internal investigation and reaffirmed its commitment to respecting industry partners and promoting a rational, healthy industry atmosphere.

title: Bun's experimental Rust rewrite hits 99.8% test compatibility on Linux x64 glibc
content: Bun, a JavaScript runtime, has rewritten its core in Rust, achieving 99.8% compatibility with its existing test suite on Linux x64 using glibc.

title: I’ve banned query strings
content: The author explains their decision to eliminate query strings from URLs. They argue that removing them cleans up link structure, improves search‑engine indexing, and avoids exposing internal data. The post discusses how the change improves consistency and user experience, noting the trade‑offs and implementation details.

title: Zed Editor Theme-Builder
content: Zed Editor Theme‑Builder is a tool that lets users create custom themes for the Zed code editor. It provides a visual interface for selecting colors, fonts, and other style settings, generates the corresponding theme file, and integrates with Zed’s theming system. Users can preview changes, export themes, and share them with others.

title: Production engineering when trading billions of dollars a day [video]
content: The video examines the role of production engineering in financial markets that trade billions of dollars daily. It outlines how engineering teams manage large, complex data pipelines, real‑time processing, and automated monitoring to ensure reliability and speed. The discussion highlights the importance of scalability, fault tolerance, and continuous deployment in environments where milliseconds can affect trading outcomes. It also touches on tooling choices, culture, and cross‑functional collaboration that enable stable, high‑performance trading systems.

title: 被誉为“世上最圣洁”的传教士在德州性侵多名男童，被判30年监禁！ | 原文
content: Former Assemblies of God missionary Daniel Savala, 72, admitted sexually abusing two boys in Texas. He was convicted and sentenced to 30 years in prison with no possibility of parole. Earlier warnings about his conduct had been ignored, and the church allegedly helped conceal the abuse. Savala was arrested on June 2, 2023, at his Houston home.

title: 日本麻辣烫卖出100元1斤天价 | 原文
content: In Japan, spicy hot pot (麻辣烫) has become a trendy, health‑focused meal. Retailers rebrand the dish’s chili and pepper broth with medicinal ingredients like astragalus and goji, touting benefits such as warming limbs and boosting circulation. The product is sold by weight and marketed as a convenient one‑person meal, appealing to single workers and students. Prices reach ¥100 per pound, far above the low‑cost, street‑food version common in China.

title: vibe coding 在崩溃的边沿疯狂摩擦
content: After a month of abandoning handwritten code, the writer has relied entirely on “vibe coding.” The resulting buggy output became overwhelming, forcing a hard shift to modular, service‑oriented architecture. This move maintains the project’s upkeep but feels like the era of architects, leaving ordinary programmers struggling to keep control as AI‑generated code grows unmanageable.

title: 神州租车的“如意算盘”：这哪是租车，分明是抢了加油站的饭碗！
content: China’s car‑sharing firm plans to combine vehicle rentals with fast‑charging hubs, turning each outlet into a quick‑charge point using BYD’s 70 kW stations. The model lets renters finish charging before returning the car, generating a second revenue stream from electricity fees. It avoids the high risks of autonomous driving, relying on BYD’s proven charging and battery tech. The strategy positions rental firms as energy access points, mirroring a global shift toward electric fleets and BYD’s ecosystem dominance.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 青囊草堂

title: 特朗普在推动开放霍尔木兹海峡的过程中，回避了最棘手的伊朗问题
content: Trump’s effort to open the Hormuz Strait sidestepped the most difficult Iran‑related issues. He focused on broader maritime freedom goals, while avoiding direct confrontations over Iran’s regional behavior and nuclear program.
